case_title: MIDLAND FNDING LLC VS. MARK MORELLO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FNDING LLC

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORELLO, MARK $2,933.63 PRINCIPAL, $179.76 INTEREST, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,362.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
